SEARCH
Package taskmanager.impl

Class DefaultTaskService

java.lang.Object
taskmanager.impl.DefaultTaskService
All Implemented Interfaces:
TaskService
public class DefaultTaskService extends Object implements TaskService
Default implementation of the TaskService interface. This class manages tasks in memory using a thread-safe data structure. It provides asynchronous operations for adding, removing, and retrieving tasks using reactive programming (Mono and Flux).

      public DefaultTaskService()

  • Method Details

    • addTask

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Void> addTask(Task task)
      Adds a new task to the system. The task is validated before being stored.
      Specified by:
      addTask in interface TaskService
      Parameters:
      task - the task to add
      Returns:
      a Mono that completes when the task is successfully added
      Throws:
      InvalidTaskException - if the task is null or contains invalid data

    • removeTask

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Void> removeTask(String taskId)
      Removes a task by its ID.
      Specified by:
      removeTask in interface TaskService
      Parameters:
      taskId - the ID of the task to remove
      Returns:
      a Mono that completes when the task is removed
      Throws:
      TaskNotFoundException - if the task does not exist

    • findTaskById

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Task> findTaskById(String taskId)
      Finds a task by its ID.
      Specified by:
      findTaskById in interface TaskService
      Parameters:
      taskId - the ID of the task
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the found task
      Throws:
      TaskNotFoundException - if the task does not exist

    • findAllTasks

      public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<Task> findAllTasks()
      Retrieves all tasks.
      Specified by:
      findAllTasks in interface TaskService
      Returns:
      a Flux emitting all stored tasks

    • findAllTasksAsList

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<List<Task>> findAllTasksAsList()
      Retrieves all tasks as a list.
      Specified by:
      findAllTasksAsList in interface TaskService
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting a list of all tasks
